Overview

This article is about the original location in Fortnite: Battle Royale. For the "smaller" version in Fortnite: Reload, see Lil'Loot Lake.
  • OG
  • C4SOG
  • Chapter 3
  • Chapter 1

OG[]

Loot Lake is a Named Location in Fortnite: OG that returned in Season 1 with the island Athena. Loot Lake was a huge shallow lake that is hiding a secret.

History

History[]

  • S1
  • S3
  • S4
  • S5
  • S6
  • S7
  • S8

Update v33.00[]

December 6th 2024

  • Loot Lake has returned along with Athena.

Update v34.20[]

March 25th 2025

  • Vending Machines were added to Loot Lake.

Update v36.00[]

June 7th 2025

  • An unbreakable chunk of the comet that crashed into Dusty Depot crashed into Loot Lake.
  • The Brick Hut has disappeared.

Update v36.10[]

June 24th 2025

  • An Omega poster was added to Loot Lake.

Update v37.00[]

August 7th 2025

  • The unbreakable chunk of the comet is now overgrown.
  • Some stage lights and a speaker were added inside of the Northern Factory in Loot Lake.

Update v37.30[]

September 23rd 2025

  • A Birthday Cake was added for Fortnite's 8th Birthday.

Update v37.31[]

September 28th 2025

  • Revin the Cube has sunken into Loot Lake, causing the water to turn red and bouncy. Bouncing on the lake now grants the pepper effect.

September 31st 2025

  • The Birthday Cake was removed as Fortnite's 8th Birthday ended.

Update v37.40[]

October 2nd 2025

  • The island in the middle of the lake rises up and starts floating over it, creating a big maelstorm at its former location. The Cube appears at the bottom of the newly-created Floating Island. The color of the lake changes back to blue and it's surface loses its effects.
  • Loot Lake was renamed to Leaky Lake.

Update v39.10[]

December 11th 2025

  • Leaky Lake was renamed back to Loot Lake.

Update v39.11[]

December 25th 2025

  • Loot Lake was covered in snow for Christmas Day.

December 26th 2025

  • The snow melted.

Update v39.40[]

Ice Storm

  • Loot Lake was covered in snow by the Ice King.

Update v39.50[]

February 27th 2026

  • The snow has partially melted.

February 28th 2026

  • The rest of the snow has melted.

Update v40.10[]

April 11th 2026

  • The Dark Harvester has arrived at Loot Lake.

April 13th 2026

  • The Dark Harvester rifted away.

Update v40.20[]

April 26th 2026

  • Digsite Gamma has appeared east of Loot Lake.

April 27th 2026

  • All of the rocks in Digsite Gamma were destroyed.
    • The excavation revealed the roof of The Vault.

April 28th 2026

  • The Black Helicopter has landed on one of the islands on Loot Lake.

Update v40.30[]

April 30th 2026

  • More excavators and trucks have appeared near Loot Lake.

May 3rd 2026

2:00 PM ET

  • The trucks have arrived at Loot Lake, unloading a haul of excavators.

May 6th 2026

2:00 PM ET

  • The excavators have surrounded Loot Lake's central divot.

Update v40.40[]

  • The central part of Loot Lake was dug out. The excavators have revealed The Vault. Several watchtowers and research facilities were constructed around it by The Government.
  • The small island that was missing from Leaky Lake has been readded back with an excavator on it.

Update v40.41[]

May 30th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

June 1st 2026

3:26pm ET[]

  • The first rune has entered The Vault, causing steam to come out of the Volcano.
    • The build-up to The Unvaulting Event has begun.

June 2nd 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

June 3rd 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • A floating rune appeared above The Vault.

5:24pm ET[]

  • The second rune has entered The Vault.

June 4th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • The floating rune was accidentally re-added above The Vault.

Last Reality
Loot Lake was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale, that returned in Chapter 4: Season OG with the island Athena. Loot Lake was a huge shallow lake that is hiding a secret.

History

History[]

  • C4SOG

Update v27.00[]

November 3rd 2023

  • Loot Lake has returned along with Athena, due to Time Travel.
  • 2 additional islands with Ziplines were added, to help players get across the water.

November 9th 2023

  • The island in the middle of the lake rises up once again and becomes the Floating Island.
  • The Time Machine has moved near the lake. Slone's Audio Recorder can be found near the machine.
  • Quadcrashers and Driftboards can now spawn here.

Update v27.10[]

November 16th 2023

  • The energy of The Zero Point is now emanating from the vortex.
  • The Time Machine has moved away.

Update v27.11[]

November 23rd 2023

  • The Zero Point appeared under the Cube. The Cube appears to be draining energy from The Zero Point.
  • The Ballers can now spawn here.
  • Quadcrashers were vaulted.

The Big Bang[]

December 2nd 2023

  • Loot Lake was sucked into The Black Hole once again.

Imagined Order (C3S2)
The Resistance (C3S3)
Loot Lake was a Landmark in Fortnite: Battle Royale, that was added in Chapter 3: Season 1 to the island Artemis. Loot Lake was a huge lake that was hiding a secret.

History

History[]

  • C3S1
  • C3S2
  • C3S3
  • C3S4

Update v19.00[]

  • Loot Lake was added.

Update v19.10[]

  • Snow around Loot Lake fully melted.

Update v20.30[]

  • May 10th 2022: IO Airship - Tilted crashed into the waters of Loot Lake, creating Tilted Touchdown.

Update v20.40[]

  • The Imagined Order built a dam, creating a base surrounding their newly built Doomsday Machine - The Collider.
    • Due to the construction of the dam, the rivers flowing through Sleepy Sound and the Sanctuary have dried.
  • Huntmaster Saber and Doctor Slone now spawn here as Bosses.

Collision[]

  • The Collider and the base surrounding it were destroyed by The Mech, piloted by The Paradigm.

Update v21.00[]

  • In the aftermath of the Collision, The Glow was created.
  • The rivers are flowing with water again.
  • Haven now spawns here as a Character.
  • Tilted Touchdown was spray painted with bright colors and is no longer a Landmarks.

Update v22.00[]

  • Loot Landing was changed to the iconic Chapter 1 Loot Lake house. A Sideways Rift can be seen above it.
  • Tilted Touchdown disappeared.
  • Most of the party decorations around The Glow were removed.
  • Haven was replaced by Bao Bros.
  • A Vault was added inside of the Large Outpost.

Update v22.20[]

  • Motorboats were vaulted.

Update v22.30[]

  • Motorboats were unvaulted.

Update v22.40[]

  • Chrome reached Loot Lake and Floaties Boats.

Fracture[]

  • Loot Lake was removed following the explosion of Reality Zero.

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Loot Lake could have been the only source of water outside the Ocean, as when the lake's water is cut, the rivers leading towards Sleepy Sound and Sanctuary are all dried up.
  • Loot Lake was considered as a "Swamp Area" in the Fishing Collection Book.

  • Former

Former[]

History

History[]

Chapter 3: Season 1[]

  • Update v19.00: Loot Lake has returned as a Landmark. The lakeside is covered in snow.
  • Update v19.10:
    • January 21st, 2022: Most of the snow on the shores of Loot Lake melted.

Chapter 3: Season 2[]

  • Update v20.00: Loot Lake has been claimed by the Imagined Order's territory.
  • Update v20.40: Loot Lake is cut off in the east to fit The Collider.
  • Content Update v20.40: Klombo hibernating spots were moved near Loot Lake.

Chapter 3: Season 3[]

  • Update v21.00: The Collider has been destroyed and The Glow now takes its place. Loot Lake is also now glowing with The Zero Point energy. Loot Lake has also increased its water area near the south east side.

Leaky Lake Leaky Lake
Loot Lake was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale, that was added in Pre-Season to the island Athena. Loot Lake was a huge shallow lake that was hiding a secret.

History

History[]

  • S0
  • S2
  • S3
  • S4
  • S5
  • S6
  • S7
  • S8
  • S9
  • SX

Update v1.6[]

September 12th 2017

  • Loot Lake was added as a part of the first version of the Battle Royale map.

Update v1.11[]

December 13th 2017

  • A Christmas tree was added.

Update v2.2.0[]

January 18th 2018

  • The Christmas tree was removed.

Update v3.40[]

March 28th 2018

  • Vending Machines were added to Loot Lake.

Update v4.00[]

May 1st 2018

  • An unbreakable chunk of the comet that crashed into Dusty Depot crashed into Loot Lake.

Update v4.30[]

May 30th 2018

  • An Omega poster was added to Loot Lake.
  • A dancing platform and disco ball were added inside the Northern Factory.

Update v5.00[]

July 12th 2018

  • The Omega poster was removed.
  • The unbreakable chunk of the comet is now overgrown.

Update v5.10[]

July 24th 2018

  • Dance platforms and disco ball on the Loot Lake warehouse were removed.

The Cube Sinking[]

September 19th 2018

  • The CUBE has reached the waters of Loot Lake and dissolved. Loot Lake turned purple and became bouncy, similar to the effect and the appearance of the CUBE.

Update v6.00[]

September 27th 2018

  • The island in the middle of the lake rises up and starts floating over it, creating a big maelstorm at its former location. The Cube appears at the bottom of the newly-created Floating Island. The color of the lake changes back to blue and it's surface loses its bounciness.
  • Loot Lake no longer appears named on the in-game map.

September 28th 2018

  • Floating Island started moving towards the rune southwest of Pleasant Park.

Update v6.02[]

October 10th 2018

  • Loot Lake was renamed to Leaky Lake.

Update v7.00[]

December 6th 2018

  • Leaky Lake was renamed back to Loot Lake.

Update v7.10[]

  • December 24th 2018: Loot Lake became an unnamed POI on playground.
  • December 25th 2018: Loot Lake was covered in snow for Christmas Day.
  • December 26th 2018: The snow disappeared.
  • Loot Lake became a named POI on playground after the removal of Challenge Games.

Update v7.20[]

  • January 19th 2019: Loot Lake was covered in snow in the aftermath of the Ice Storm Event.

Update v7.30[]

  • February 1st: The snow melted from Loot Lake.

Update v8.20[]

April 5th 2019

  • Digsite Gamma appeared near Loot Lake.
    • It was up to the players to destroy the rocks. Each rock had several million health points.

April 7th 2019

  • All of the rocks were destroyed by the players.
    • The excavation revealed a moai statue and the roof of The Vault.

April 9th 2019

  • The helicopter has landed on one of the islands on Loot Lake.

Update v8.30[]

April 10th 2019

  • A Reboot Van was added to Loot Lake.
  • More excavators and trucks have appeared near Loot Lake.

April 12th 2019

  • Excavators are starting to head towards Loot Lake.

April 15th 2019

  • All the excavators have surrounded the Loot Lake middle island.

Update v8.40[]

April 17th 2019

  • The central part of Loot Lake was dug out. The excavators have revealed The Vault. Several watchtowers and research facilities were constructed around it by The Government.

April 18th 2019

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

April 21st 2019

  • The first rune has entered The Vault.
    • The build-up to The Unvaulting Event has begun.
    • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

April 22nd 2019

  • The second rune appeared above The Vault.

April 23rd 2019

  • The second rune has entered The Vault.
    • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

Update v8.50[]

April 25th 2019

  • One of The Government setups in Loot Lake now has a chalkboard in it, which displays a possible theory that the hatch is a vault of some sort.
    • 6 screens were also added.
  • The third rune has entered The Vault.

April 26th 2019

  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a Bouncer.

April 28th 2019

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.
  • The fourth rune has entered The Vault later that day.

April 30th 2019

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.
  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a Drum Gun.

April 31st 2019

  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a X-4 Stormwing.

May 1st 2019

  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a Tactical Submachine Gun.

Update v8.51[]

May 2nd 2019

  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a Grappler.

May 3rd 2019

  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows the Infinity Blade.
  • The fifth and final rune has entered The Vault.
    • A 24 hour countdown timer has appeared above The Vault.

The Unvaulting Event[]

May 4th 2019

  • The countdown above Loot Lake expired, The Vault has opened, sending players back to The In-Between. Soon after players chose their winner and exited the realm, the smoke from the Volcano had covered the sky and soon began to erupt.

Update v9.00[]

  • The Vault was turned into a power source for Neo Tilted. Grass and trees have grown in the dug-up area.
  • The Factories were upgraded by The Government.
  • There is also a Slipstream line running next to the factories.

Update v9.30[]

  • The Devourer attacked The Government-owned buildings at Loot Lake. A footprint has been left in the tarmac
    • The wire connecting to Neo Tilted was slightly damaged during the incident.
  • A Snow Cones truck can be found at the north west corner of Loot Lake.
  • July 2nd 2019: A giant rubber duck is coming to Loot Lake.
  • July 7th 2019: The duck climbs the river, almost in the Loot Lake part.
  • July 8th 2019: The duck is now swimming in Loot Lake.

Update v9.40[]

  • July 17th 2019: The duck is now gone as the 14 Days of Summer Event ended.

The Final Showdown[]

  • Mecha Team Leader smashed open The Vault and used The Zero Point power to defeat The Devoured.

Update v9.41[]

  • July 24th 2019: The Zero Point turned slightly red. Rift sounds can be heard around it.
  • July 25th 2019: The Zero Point above the resort has turned slightly purple and it has a blue aura around it.
    • A Birthday Cake was added for Fortnite's 2nd Birthday.
  • July 27th 2019: The Zero Point got brighter and is making strange heartbeat or clock noises. More particles is also coming off it.
  • July 29th 2019: The Zero Point become very bright and has more particles coming out of it. There is also a lot of light coming out of it.
  • July 30th 2019: The Zero Point is now pulsing and emitting a lot of very fast string-like particles. It is also extremely bright and flashing.
  • July 31st 2023: The Birthday Cake was removed as Fortnite's 2nd Birthday ended.

Update v10.00[]

  • Time around The Zero Point froze, creating an anti-gravity bubble with floating objects everywhere around it. Strange noises can be heard when inside it.
  • The power cable is now inactive as The Zero Point is no longer inside of dirt-filled The Vault.

Update v10.10[]

  • A new wrecked building appeared. It is a combination of one The Government buildings from Season 8 and destroyed factory from Season 9.
  • One of the 2 CUBE Memorials appeared on one of the islands from The Butterfly Event.

Update v10.40[]

  • The Zero Point started making clock-like ticking noises.

The End[]

  • During the event, the giant rift caused multiple rockets as well as the meteor to rain down onto The Zero Point. This ultimately caused a massive explosion and created a black hole that sucked in the entire island.

Audio

Audio[]

  • The Zero Point

The Zero Point[]

Season 9 (Cracked)
Season 9 (Destabilized)
Season X

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Loot Lake was one of the most changed locations on the Athena island.
